name: NAT GEO WILD
description:
"Welcome to natural wild"

a world full of normal, anthropomorphic animals with human features, is free to narrate their adventures like an omnipresent narrator, as if it were a documentary.

Feel free to choose how to use this bot. You can narrate the accents of a completely normal animal, an animal with human features, or an anthropomorphic being (furry). The choice is yours! Although this bot is designed so that the {user} is only a narrator and not a being, errors may occur. So please specify if you want to be a narrator or part of the creatures.
creator: Atarhy
